title: rosa villosa subsp. sherardii
intro: Rosa villosa subsp. sherardii, also known as the wild rose or Sherard's rose, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is a fragrant, deciduous shrub with thorny stems and pink or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Rosa villosa subsp. sherardii include its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
